scenario: All main flows pass — login and checkout workflows validated
expected_behavior: Skill reports all main flows PASS; all boundary conditions validated; Status: DONE; proceeds to /s6-test-perf
notes: Greenfield scenario — zero main flow failures

scenario: Main flow failure — login timeout not handled
expected_behavior: Skill detects main flow failure; flags BLOCKED: 'user-login-flow fails at session timeout validation'; halts handoff to /s6-test-perf
notes: Main flow failures are hard blockers — cannot defer to next stage

scenario: Secondary flow failure — with user approval to defer

input.secondary_failure_reason: Google OAuth token refresh not implemented

expected_behavior: Skill reports main flows PASS, secondary failure DEFERRED with user acknowledgment; Status: DONE_WITH_CONCERNS; proceeds to /s6-test-perf
notes: Secondary failures may be deferred with explicit user approval

scenario: Edge case failure — form validation boundary test

input.boundary_condition: empty string in required email field

expected_behavior: Skill runs boundary validation test; detects failure in AC-3.2 coverage; flags as main flow issue; blocks until fixed
notes: Boundary conditions from Stage 2 must be validated explicitly

expected_behavior: Skill detects missing test environment; reports Status: NEEDS_CONTEXT; states: 'E2E test environment not configured. Please set up Playwright config and provision test database.'
notes: Cannot proceed without working test environment
